titleStmt.title: SII 26.725: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 725. (A.R. No. 674 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.
It refers to the king as ‘who was pleased to take Madurai, Īḻam (i.e., Ceylon), Karuvūr and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya and who was pleased to perform the anointment of the heroes and victors’.

It records a gift of land 301-1/4 kuḻi in extent, made by a certain Tillai Tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ Viśaiyālaya Muttaraiyaṉ alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyirappiḷḷai of Vaḷambakkuḍi, a pratikshēttra, to some bhaṭṭars of the temple of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Vaḍakavira-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉivaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the land was situated in the backyard of some houses in the street on the southern side of the temple. It is also stated that some specified quantity of Śīkāvērī (i.e., Kāvērī) water was to be supplied for the purpose of bathing the image of the deity.
It also records the gift of income from some other land, as tirumañjanappuṟam, by the same donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇ
ṭaruḷi virāpiṣekamum vijayāpiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa śrītiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 2 Āvatu pāṇṭikulācaṉi
vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakaviranāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyilukkut teṟkil tirumaṭaviḷā
kattut tillaiyuḷār maṉaikkuk kiḻakku nāyakappiḷḷai mutaliyār �ṉ caṇṭeśvara vilai koṇṭeṭutta kukai
kol Eṭṭukku meṟku varukiṟa puḻaikkaṭaivāy niḷac vvai kol Eṭṭunikki Itaṉ teṟku periyāḻvāṉāṉa kulo
ttuṅkacoḻappiḷḷai Uḷḷiṭṭār māṇapoka nilam Araimā Araikkāṇikkiḻaraiye muṉṟu māvum Itaṉ kiḻakku Āḷavantārāṉa ca
tācivapaṭṭaṉ mā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye yorumāvum Itaṉ kiḻakku tūrvaiyuṭṭa
Ā ntappāṉ Āṭukira civapaṇṭitar māṇapoka nilam Oru māvaraiye Araikkāṇiyum Āka nilam munṟumāvarai kiḻ nālumā
ṭṭam perumāḷenṟu kallāl ceykiṟa pūcāttāṉak kāṭṭum puḻaikkaṭaivāy niḷaṅkaḷumākaiyil Ivvūr poṟkoyi kku
koḷḷa ṭule veṇāṟṟāṉ kulottuṅkacoḻamārāyaṉum Ivan makkaḷum mā kaiyil Ivarkaḷukkun taṉakkum naṉṟākat taṉ kāṇiyāṉa tirunaṭṭap
perumāḷp pakkal nilam munṟumākkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ nālu māvum Ikkulottuṅkacoḻamārāyaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ Āḷuṭaiyāḷ Ica
ttu nāya kku Innilam kuṭikūṟa puḻaikkaṭaivāy muṭai
va paṇṭitaṟkum catācivapaṭṭar Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum kulottuṅkacoḻapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum pratikṣettiramāka viṭṭa nilattukkum kiḻpāṟkel
lai vaṭakkoṭiya vāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Uḷakaḷantaperumāḷ tiruviḻāppuṟattukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai māṇapoka nāṟṟaṅkālka
ḷukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai muvaraiya periyāṇṭān Uḷḷiṭṭa tiruviḻāppuṟattukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuṭpaṭṭa nilattuk
ku nilam muṉṟumāviṉ kiḻnālumāviṉāl kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟoṉṟekālum viṭṭu Ivarkaḷ nilaṅkaḷukku ppuḻaikkaṭai vāyākattanta nilaṅkaḷukkuk kiḻpāṟke
llai vaṭakkoṭiya māṇapoka vāykkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai nittamaṇavāḷaṉ ku koṭi kālukku vaṭakkum mipārkke
llai Āḷavantaṟāṉa māṇikkaccoḻamārāyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār muṭukkucceykkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai � ta vil mu ṭa
pāy nāḷattukku teṟkkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai Uṭpaṭṭanilam muṉṟu māva
ye koṇṭu Innilattukku viṭṭa ti māvu
Uḷḷūrttevatāṉam Aṟupatin kalavaricaiyil mutalāyc cipaṇṭārattukku Iṟuppāya varukaiyil Innilattukkut talaimāṟāka va
ḷampakuṭaiyāṉ tillaitirunaṭṭapperumāḷ vicaiyālaiya muttaraiyaṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirappiḷḷaiyeṉ tevatāṉam mumukkuṭitaruḷa tu talaiyil nā
ṉ caṇṭecurap peruvilaikoṇṭu kuṭuppitta nilam Aimpattaṟukalavaricaiyākaiyil varicait tuṇṭam peṟṟi viṭṭa nilam munṟumā
mukkāṇiyum Uḷḷa nilattile mutal koḷḷappaṇṇi U ka I kiṟapaṭiye cipaṇṭārattile Iṟaikoṇṭu varuvatākavum Innilattu
kku pratikṣetram paṇṇiṉa puḻaikkaṭai nilam muṉṟumāviṉ kiḻnālumāvum Uḷḷūr mutalil kaḻittu Iṟaiyiliyākki Ūrnattattuṭalāka kūṭṭi
c cantirātittavaṟ kulakakkup puḻaikkaṭaiyāyc cella ka ta vum Ittiruttil Uṭaiyārkku Āṭiyaruḷic cikāverit tirumaiñcaṉam
nāḷ Oṉṟukku Irutūṇi koḷḷuṅ kuṭam Iraṇṭiṉāl tirumaiñcaṉamikkalaṉe tūṇiyum vaikkkaṭavutākavum vaikkakumiṭattu Ivvā
ṭṭaippuraṭṭāti māca mutal gautamaṉ campantapperumāḷ vai kkiṟa kuṭam Oṉṟukku nilam Araiveliyum tāḻiyāṉa Ammiraṉa
pūṣaṇa nampivaikkiṟa kuṭam Oṉṟukku nilam Araiveliyum ka nilam veliyum cilvariyuḷḷiṭṭa Āyaṅkaḷan tavirnta Iṟai
yiliye peṟṟu Itanmam cempilum
ṭāka kaṭanāka Ivarkaḷum piṉpu Ivarkaḷ vaṟkattiluḷḷārume vaikkak kaṭavatāka viṭṭanilam veliyum muṉpu tevan Āṇ
ṭavar cuvaittu varukiṟa paḻa Iṟaiyilikkut tirumañcaṉam tūṇi koḷḷuṅ kuṭa vaittu varukaiyil Ituvum nāḷ Oṉ
ṟukku Irutūṇikoḷḷuṅ kuṭattāle yoru kuṭam vaikkak kaṭavatākavum Uḷ nilattut tirumaiñcaṉappuṟamāka muṉpu pe
ṟṟu varukiṟa nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum muṉṟupokam viḷaiyilum puṉpayi yilum Ivaṉe peṟṟu Ippaṭiye
vaippāṉākavum Ittaṉmaṅkaḷ cantirātittavaṟ cellak kaṭavatāka In Iṟaiyilikaḷ viṭṭeṉ vaḷampakuṭaiya
ṉ tillaitirunaṭṭapperumāḷ vicaiyālaiya muttaraiyaṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapiḷḷaiyeṉ Itu paṉmāheśvarara
kṣai ...§
Digital edition of SII 26.725 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
